title: Intensely Savory Russian Beef Skewers
description: A post-workout Russian dish featuring cultured creme fraiche and shio cure, with a jammy and snappy texture, this recipe is low glycemic friendly and perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together creme fraiche, shio cure, olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the beef strips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the skewers for 8 minutes per side, or until the beef is cooked to the desired level of doneness
While the skewers are cooking, grill the chopped onion for 2 minutes per side, or until slightly charred
Once the skewers are done, let them rest for 2 minutes before serving
Serve the skewers with the grilled onion and a sprinkle of chopped parsley
